name: Chocolate Pinon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. With an electric mixer, cream the butter and sugar in a medium-size bowl. Stir in the vanilla, grated chocolate, and pine nuts. Mix in the flour and salt. Chill the dough.
When ready to bake, roll out the dough on a floured surface to a 1/4-inch thickness. Cut out cookies with a 2-inch round cookie cutter. Gather scraps together and reroll the dough to cut out more cookies. Place cookies slightly apart on a nonstick baking sheet. Bake for 10 minutes, or until dry and firm.
When cool, dust the cookies with powered sugar. This recipe yields about 28 to 32 cookies.
